scripts.prepare-001: node scripts/dither-ink.mjs && tsx scripts/dither-label.mts && tsx scripts/dither-hunt.mts
scripts.render-001: remotion render Day001-16x9 out/001-16x9.mp4 && remotion render Day001-4x5 out/001-4x5.mp4 && remotion render Day001-9x16 out/001-9x16.mp4 && remotion still Day001-4x5 --frame=352 out/001-card.png && remotion still Day001-Hunt out/001-hunt.png
